# {data-menu-title="QR Code"}

::: {layout="[22,78]"}

Scan to view the slides

```{=html}
<img
    alt="QR code linking to this talk's web page."
    src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?data=https://connoraird.github.io/talks/{{< meta slug >}}&amp;bgcolor=000000&amp;color=ffffff&amp;size=550x550"
    style="display:block;margin:auto;width:550px;"
/>
```

:::
